{{Quote|That gives us room for about 75 troopers and maybe 1000 kilos of equipment. It'll be tight. If we're wearing space suits, you can cut down our efficiency and speed by 18 percent.|Toombs|<ref name="Minutes" />}}
'''Toombs''' was a [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] serving in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic's]] [[Alliance Special Forces/Legends|Special Forces]]. Toombs assisted in planning [[Operation Cobolt]], and, along with [[Gideon (rebel)|Gideon]], led the assault teams assigned to penetrate the [[Imperial orbital base]] over [[Mantooine/Legends|Mantooine]] to recover a new [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]] [[Scandoc decoding computer]].<ref name="Minutes" /> Toombs was [[Death/Legends|killed]] during the operation, and Madine requested permission from [[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]] to recommend Toombs for posthumous promotion and commendation.<ref name="Report" />
